title: 'Eliyshah #0473
definition:
Elishah = "God of the coming (one)"

 1) descendant of Noah, son of Javan; perhaps ancestor of the Aeolians
nasbUsage:
Definition: Elishah = "God of the coming (one)"

 1) descendant of Noah, son of Javan; perhaps ancestor of the Aeolians

    NASB:  a son of Javan, also his desc. and their land
